0.name: 1531 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_9
0.rationale: PVR (periventricular region) matches MBA:341 (PeN/periventricular posterior), one of two classical soma locations. GABAergic NT type consistent with avpv_kiss1_neuron (GABAergic/dopaminergic). Parent SUPT_0419 is a PVR GABAergic supertype. Male_female_ratio=1.13 is near-equal, slightly disappointing for a female-biased type but within ambiguity range for a mixed-sex atlas cluster. Score 5 reflects marker/location alignment. Best rank-0 candidate given periventricular location fidelity.

0.name: 1876 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_1
0.rationale: PVpo-VMPO-MPN (periventricular preoptic / ventromedial preoptic / medial preoptic nucleus) is adjacent to AVPV (MBA:272) but not a direct match. AVPV sits at the rostral extreme of the periventricular zone; PVpo overlaps anatomically. GABAergic, consistent with NT type. Male_female_ratio=1.17, slightly male-biased — weak counter-evidence for female-biased type. Plausible if Kiss1/Esr1 marker expression confirmed in this cluster.

0.name: 1889 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_2
0.rationale: Same PVpo-VMPO-MPN lineage as CLUS_1876. GABAergic, score 5. Male_female_ratio=1.70 — mildly male-biased, a weak counter-indicator for a female-biased type. Adjacent-region caveat applies. Viable secondary candidate if marker expression supports.

0.name: 1909 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_3
0.rationale: PVpo-VMPO-MPN region, GABAergic, score 5. Male_female_ratio=1.56 — mildly male-biased, same caveat as siblings. Preoptic adjacency to AVPV is the key uncertainty; marker check needed.

0.name: 1888 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_2
0.rationale: PVpo-VMPO-MPN, GABAergic, score 5, but male_female_ratio=5.67 — strongly male-biased. This is strong counter-evidence for a cell type defined as female-biased (more cells in females). Preoptic location adds further uncertainty. Deprioritized on sex-ratio grounds.

0.name: 1301 MEA-BST Lhx6 Nfib Gaba_4
0.rationale: Score 5 driven by marker hits, but MEA-BST (medial amygdala / bed nucleus of stria terminalis) is a distant region — genuine counter-evidence for an AVPV/PeN type. Male_female_ratio=0.10 is extremely female-biased (supporting the sex-bias direction) but location mismatch is disqualifying for a soma-location-specific classical type. Do not advance unless MBA overlap is confirmed in the atlas.

0.name: 1309 MEA-BST Lhx6 Nfib Gaba_5
0.rationale: MEA-BST region is distant from AVPV/PeN. Male_female_ratio=1.56 — mildly male-biased. Both location and sex ratio argue against this cluster. Score 5 likely driven by Lhx6 / marker overlap. Exclude.

0.name: 1503 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_1
0.rationale: PVR (periventricular region) — matches MBA:341 soma location. GABAergic. Male_female_ratio=0.92, near-equal to slightly female-biased (preferred direction). Parent SUPT_0411 is a PVR GABAergic supertype that also ranks highly at rank 1. Good secondary candidate; marker expression confirmation needed.

0.name: 1505 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_1
0.rationale: PVR, GABAergic, male_female_ratio=0.85 — slightly female-biased (preferred). Same parent (SUPT_0411) as CLUS_1503. Sibling cluster; jointly assessed as plausible secondary candidates within the PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_1 supertype.

0.name: 1521 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_5
0.rationale: PVR, GABAergic, male_female_ratio=0.59 — female-biased (preferred direction for avpv_kiss1_neuron). Parent SUPT_0415 is a high-scoring rank-1 candidate. Among PVR clusters, this one has the most favourable sex ratio.

0.name: 1530 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_8
0.rationale: PVR, GABAergic, male_female_ratio=0.75 — female-biased, consistent with female-biased classical type. Parent SUPT_0418 is a top-scoring rank-1 candidate.

0.name: 1522 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_5
0.rationale: PVR, GABAergic, male_female_ratio=0.89 — slightly female-biased. Sibling of CLUS_1521 within SUPT_0415.

0.name: 1507 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_1
0.rationale: PVR, GABAergic, male_female_ratio=1.04 — near-equal. Third sibling in SUPT_0411. Slightly lower priority than CLUS_1503/1505 on sex ratio.

0.name: 1305 MEA-BST Lhx6 Nfib Gaba_5
0.rationale: MEA-BST — distant from AVPV/PeN. Male_female_ratio=6.14 — strongly male-biased. Both location and sex ratio strongly argue against. Exclude.

0.rationale: PVR, GABAergic, male_female_ratio=1.63 — mildly male-biased. Parent SUPT_0419. Periventricular location; sex ratio is a minor negative.

0.name: 1534 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_9
0.rationale: PVR, GABAergic, male_female_ratio=1.17 — near-equal. Parent SUPT_0419. Periventricular location match.

0.name: 1712 AHN Onecut3 Gaba_3
0.rationale: AHN (anterior hypothalamic nucleus) — adjacent but distinct from AVPV/PeN. GABAergic. Male_female_ratio=1.38. Location is a weak counter-indicator. Deprioritize.

1.name: 0418 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_8
1.rationale: PVR (periventricular region) supertype — directly matches the MBA:341 soma location (PeN/periventricular posterior). GABAergic, consistent with NT type. Contains cluster CLUS_1530 (male_female_ratio=0.75, female-biased) as well as other PVR siblings. This is the most anatomically coherent rank-1 parent grouping for the periventricular component of avpv_kiss1_neuron. Six3/Sox3 transcription factor combination is consistent with hypothalamic periventricular identity. Top rank-1 candidate.

1.name: 0417 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_7
1.rationale: PVR supertype, GABAergic, periventricular region. Contains CLUS_1525 and CLUS_1526. Equivalent quality to SUPT_0418 — both are PVR Six3 Sox3 supertypes. The avpv_kiss1_neuron classical type may span multiple supertypes given its heterogeneity (type I / type II ephys subtypes noted in classical node).

1.name: 0415 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_5
1.rationale: PVR supertype, GABAergic. Contains CLUS_1521 (male_female_ratio=0.59, most female-biased of the PVR clusters) and CLUS_1520/1522. The female-biased sex ratio of CLUS_1521 is the strongest sex-ratio signal among PVR clusters and aligns well with female-biased avpv_kiss1_neuron.

1.name: 0411 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_1
1.rationale: PVR supertype, GABAergic. Contains CLUS_1503 (ratio=0.92) and CLUS_1505 (ratio=0.85) — both slightly female-biased. Four PVR supertypes (0411, 0415, 0417, 0418) all score equally; avpv_kiss1_neuron may be distributed across multiple, or most concentrated in one requiring marker-level confirmation.

1.name: 0482 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_1
1.rationale: PVpo-VMPO-MPN (periventricular preoptic / ventromedial preoptic / medial preoptic nucleus) — adjacent to AVPV but not exact. AVPV lies at the periventricular preoptic border, so this region is anatomically plausible. GABAergic. Weaker location match than PVR supertypes. Plausible if marker expression (Kiss1, Esr1) confirmed.

1.name: 0449 AHN-SBPV-PVHd Pdrm12 Gaba_4
1.rationale: AHN-SBPV-PVHd includes anterior hypothalamic nucleus — adjacent to but distinct from AVPV/PeN. Score 3. Deprioritize.

1.name: 0486 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5
1.rationale: PVpo-VMPO-MPN, score 3. Adjacent preoptic region; lower confidence than SUPT_0482. Weak candidate.

1.name: 0374 CEA-AAA-BST Six3 Sp9 Gaba_2
1.rationale: CEA-AAA-BST — distant amygdala/BST region. Location mismatch disqualifies.

1.name: 0348 MEA-BST Lhx6 Sp9 Gaba_2
1.rationale: MEA-BST — distant from AVPV/PeN. Location mismatch disqualifies.

1.name: 0236 STR Lhx8 Gaba_1
1.rationale: STR (striatum) — very distant. Exclude.

1.name: 0249 NDB-SI-MA-STRv Lhx8 Gaba_6
1.rationale: NDB-SI-MA-STRv (nucleus of diagonal band / substantia innominata / ventral striatum) — distant from AVPV/PeN. Exclude.

1.name: 1073 DTN-LDT-IPN Otp Pax3 Gaba_5
1.rationale: DTN-LDT-IPN (dorsal tegmental / laterodorsal tegmental / interpeduncular nucleus) — brainstem, very distant. Exclude.

1.name: 0227 Sst Gaba_14
1.rationale: Sst-defined supertype — Sst (somatostatin) is not a classical marker of avpv_kiss1_neuron and is not in the candidate marker set. Location unspecified. Exclude.

1.name: 0276 STR D2 Gaba_3
1.rationale: STR D2 (striatal D2 receptor type) — striatal, distant. Exclude.

1.name: 0182 Vip Gaba_10
1.rationale: VIP-defined cortical interneuron supertype — no anatomical or neurochemical concordance with avpv_kiss1_neuron. Exclude.

1.name: 0304 LSX Otx2 Gaba_4
1.rationale: LSX (lateral septal complex) — distinct region. Exclude.

1.name: 1080 NLL-po Pax7 Gaba_1
1.rationale: NLL-po (nucleus of lateral lemniscus) — brainstem, very distant. Score 2. Exclude.

1.name: 1150 CBX MLI Megf11 Gaba_2
1.rationale: CBX (cerebellar cortex) molecular layer interneuron — cerebellum, very distant. Exclude.

1.name: 1151 CBX MLI Cdh22 Gaba_1
1.rationale: CBX molecular layer interneuron — cerebellum. Exclude.

1.name: 1152 CBX Purkinje Gaba_1

non_candidates_summary: The DB returned 30 rank-0 and 20 rank-1 candidates. After location filtering, two coherent groups emerge as viable: (1) PVR Six3 Sox3 GABAergic clusters/supertypes — these match the PeN/periventricular soma location (MBA:341) and have GABAergic NT type consistent with avpv_kiss1_neuron; among PVR clusters, CLUS_1521 (ratio=0.59) and CLUS_1530 (ratio=0.75) have the most female-biased sex ratios. (2) PVpo-VMPO-MPN GABAergic clusters — preoptic region adjacent to AVPV (MBA:272); weaker location match but not excluded. All MEA-BST, CEA-AAA-BST, STR, AHN, LSX, and cerebellar candidates are excluded on location grounds. CLUS_1888 (PVpo-VMPO-MPN, ratio=5.67) and CLUS_1305 (MEA-BST, ratio=6.14) are excluded on combined location and strong male bias. NOTE: the WMB atlas does not appear to have clusters explicitly labeled 'AVPV' at rank 0; the classical AVPV population is likely distributed across PVR and PVpo supertypes. Marker-level verification (Kiss1, Esr1, Th expression in the atlas clusters) is essential to narrow to a single best match.
